title: Implement cross-source deduplication and provenance registry
requirements: Track source identities, raw hashes, normalized text hashes, attachment hashes, near-duplicate fingerprints, semantic claim hashes and business keys.
Exact duplicates should merge evidence automatically when scope and sensitivity permit it.
Near-duplicates should create duplicate candidates or version clusters.
Semantic duplicate facts should merge at claim level with multiple evidence refs.
Preserve provenance for all evidence; never silently delete duplicate evidence.
